courses.title: The madside Tour
courses.description: Learn madside itself: assemble & run, the editor, the debugger, snapshots, the asset pipeline, and the project manifest — one Atari + MADS feature at a time.

courses.title: Atari Assembly Basics
courses.description: Write your first 6502 programs for the Atari 8-bit: screen memory, loops, and colour. Three short lessons, each with a task you assemble and run.
